transcript_quality: summary only — Granola meeting notes; Web Meeting 2
address: Apartment 5 Middleton Chambers, 33 Lowgate, Hull, HU1 1PE
lead_profile_text: Existing short-let owner seeking better management. Managed by Residential Estates/Guests for 2 years. Major maintenance failures: toilet leak left unaddressed caused £1,600 damage wiping out a month's earnings; fridge freezer breakdown during relocation booking. No individual property identity (hotel-style listing with shared reviews/photos). Wi-Fi problems — 4G mobile router, lost Amazon relocation client, negative reviews. LSH managing fibre installation (delayed). Web Meeting 2 — first full meeting after rescheduled April call. Zac addressed London-base concern and software fee concern in writing before call.
emotional_profile: High-intent lead with clear motivation to switch — direct experience of failures with current manager (£1,600 damage, lost relocation client). Analytical — will want specifics. Said 'I just want someone to actually manage it properly.' Offer expires 31 May (9 days from meeting).
